Values.value: Entity number is null in the request

INVOKE.COMMENT: call systemConfiguraion business rule with paramName

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: split challenge_code and add to list

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Search challenge in DB List if DB list is notnull ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- Search if ChallengeCode is present in Retrieved Challenges ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Challenge present in DB list ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: challenge does not exist in DB - create AutoOptIn challenge logic

BRANCH.COMMENT: check AutoOptIn status for the record from DB

SEQUENCE.NAME: TRUE
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: chellenge is not active and AutoOptIn is TRUE

MAP.COMMENT: ---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---
---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether transient error or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transient error, throw exception for retry

Values.value: Failed to execute createAutoOptIn service due to transient error. Throwing exception for retry.

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: not transient error, push message to dead letter queue or retry

MAP.COMMENT: check if exception is entity_number not present in request

Values.value: Entity number is null in the request

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: check if exception is entity_number not present in request

Values.value: Entity number is null in the request

createAutoOptin --- Entity Not Found Exception --- JMS message for entity %PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/EventInfo[0]/EntityNumber% pushed to DeadLetter Queue %deadLetterqueue% ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- get connection and destination details of original queue ---

Values.value: createAutoOptin --- Non-Transient Error --- JMS message for entity %PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/PolicyPointsAndEventsChangeMessage/EventInfo[0]/EntityNumber% pushed for Retry ---
Message Posted to Generic Retry Mechanism
